Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Continued To Dec-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-06-2007 and codicil dated Jul-15-2010 are admitted to probate. Andrea J. Huber is appointed Executor of the will with full authority. Bond is Fixed at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-29-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Continued To Oct-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
